subcodes.first_line: O Asad! We render thanks unto God on thy behalf, for He hath enabled thee to attain that which the learned ones and divines of the earth remain veiled from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسد انا نحمد الله من قبلک انه ایدک علی ما احتجب عنه علماء الارض و فقهائها
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @wisdom [hikmat], @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @free will and predestination; fate
